name: Hellbreaker
description: From Dave and Bambi Strident Crisis. Is staggering 9 ft tall and is average to thin, but has muscle. fairly in the middle skin, large scary intimidating eyes with tiny red pupil, and almost always has a smile. wears a crimson hat with a large brim and big spikes on top. wears a red tight gown with a crimson huge cape. has four long arms with clawed long fingers.
creator: mxstrebel7
